did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper developed an end-user device and PC software for mole analysis using the ABCD rule (asymmetry, border, color, diameter) via traditional image processing techniques (e.g., thresholding, color space conversion) rather than AI, machine learning, or deep learning. While the introduction mentions that other studies use ML/DL, this specific work explicitly relies on the ABCD rule for feature extraction and classification, validating it on the PH2 database and a custom dataset of 26 images without employing AI algorithms for the diagnostic results.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
